value.found_quote: A central [`LlmAgent`](/agents/llm-agents/) (Coordinator) manages several specialized `sub_agents`. ... Route incoming requests to the appropriate specialist agent. ... Primarily uses **LLM-Driven Delegation** (requires clear `description`s on sub-agents and appropriate `instruction` on Coordinator) or **Explicit Invocation (`AgentTool`)** (Coordinator includes `AgentTool`-wrapped specialists in its `tools`).
value.name: Coordinator and dispatcher
